message:
refactor: frankensearch migration cleanups and integration tests

- Replace duplicate SemanticFilter adapter with frankensearch's SearchFilter
  trait impl directly (bead ltbab): remove ~80 lines of FsSemanticDocId,
  FsSemanticFilterAdapter, parse_fs_semantic_doc_id; add semantic_filter_as_search_filter()
- Replace hardcoded diagnostics_connector_paths() with franken_agent_detection
  detect_installed_agents() API (bead 2ysx1): ~60 lines → ~20 lines
- Migrate remaining direct tantivy imports to frankensearch::lexical re-exports
  in query.rs, tantivy.rs, indexer/mod.rs (bead uc0qs)
- Gut TwoTierSearcher internals to delegate to frankensearch (bead 2fu7e)
- Add comprehensive frankensearch integration test suite (bead s3ho2)
- Add commented-out frankensqlite compat gate test deps (bead 3vvqa);
  fsqlite-mvcc nightly features block test compilation on stable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+# frankensqlite compat gate tests (bead 3vvqa) — COMMENTED OUT: fsqlite-mvcc requires
+# nightly features (peer_credentials_unix_socket, unix_socket_ancillary_data) which break
+# ALL test compilation on stable Rust. Re-enable when nightly toolchain is configured.
+# fsqlite = { version = "0.1.1", path = "../frankensqlite/crates/fsqlite", features = ["fts5"] }
+# fsqlite-types = { version = "0.1.1", path = "../frankensqlite/crates/fsqlite-types" }
+# fsqlite-error = { version = "0.1.1", path = "../frankensqlite/crates/fsqlite-error" }
 
 [[bin]]
 name = "cass"
